docTitle: Baibolo mu Mapu · Baibolo mu Kupituluka Kumo
metaDesc: Konkani inshila ya Cipangano ca Kale, ubumi bwakwa Yesu, ne myendo ya kwa Paulo pa mapu ya cine — Baibolo lyacitikile mu ncende sha cine cine.

s.title: Baibolo mu Mapu
s.verse: “Ifwe ilyo twamushimikile pa kwisa ukwamaka ukwa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu tatwabomfeshe imilumbe iyakwelenganyafye iyoo. Ifwe twaliimwenene na menso yesu ubucindami bwakwe.” (2 Petro 1:16)
s.purpose: Baibolo te lyashi lya kunenako. Ni cilembelo ca bantu abaendele pa ncende sha cine, inshiku, na mashina ya cine. Konkani inshila ishi pa mapu, mu kukonkana kwa nshita — kanda pa ncende, nelyo kanda ▶ pakuti upituluke mu fyonse akashiwi ku kashiwi.
s.ot_kick: ① Icipangano ca Kale — ukupitulukila mu nshita
s.ot_h: Ukufuma ku kupanga ukufika ku kubwela ku Yerusalemu
s.ot_lead: Te lwendo lumo lweka iyo lelo ni kupita kwa lyashi lya lubembu ne pusukilo ukufuma ku kupanga: ukupanga no kuwa → ilyeshi na Babeli → ukwita (Abrahamu) → icalo cabulayo → Ukufuma → matololo → ukucimfya → ubufumu → ukukanyanwa → ubunkole → ukubwela.
s.je_kick: ② Icipangano Cipya — ubumi bwakwa Yesu
s.je_h: Ukufuma ku Betelehemu ukufika ku Yerusalemu
s.je_lead: Konkani ubumi bwakwa Yesu ifyo Imbila Nsuma shisosa, mu kukonkana — ukufuma ku kufyalwa kwakwe mu Betelehemu ukupita mu lubatisho lwakwe no mulimo mu Galileya, ukupita mu Samaria, ukufika ku cifulebente, ukubuka, no kunina mu Yerusalemu.
s.pa_kick: ③ Icipangano Cipya — imyendo ya kwa Paulo
s.pa_h: Ukufuma ku Antiokia ukufika ku mpela sha calo — Roma
s.pa_lead: Ukufuma ku Pentekoste mu Yerusalemu, ifyo imbila nsuma yananwike ukupita Yudeya — ukupita mu Asia Minor na Europe ukufika ku mutima wa bufumu. Saleni umwendo umo ku myendo isano (1·2·3 + ulwendo lwa ku Roma + pa numa ya kufutuluka) kabili konkani ifyacitike mu Imilimo na makalata ayalembwa mu nshila.
s.foot: Ifyebo fyafuma · Incende shikonka icebo ca mu Baibolo ne mapu ya Baibolo aya bonse (na mashina ya nomba uko yaafwa). Inkulwa sha bemba, imimana, na mabemba fyalembwa ukufuma ku fyebo fya calo ifya bonse (Natural Earth), fyangushiwe.

eden.name: Edeni (Ukupanga · Ukuwa)
eden.note: Mu calo icapangilwe “icisuma nganshi,” ulubembu lwaingila no kuputula ubumo bwa muntu na Lesa.
events: Ukupanga mu nshiku 6 — “cali cisuma nganshi”
Umuntu uwapangilwe mu cifwani cakwa Lesa
Ukuwa, no kutamfiwa mu Edeni
Ubulayo bwa ntanshi ubwa mbila nsuma — “ubufyashi bwa mwanakashi bukashonaula umutwe wa nsoka”

noah.name: Ararati (Ilyeshi)
noah.today: Ulupili lwa Ararati, ku kabanga ka Türkiye ya lelo
noah.note: Lesa apingula icalo icaisula ulubembu, lelo asunga ubumi ku lupwa lumo.
events: Icalo icaisula ububi
Ilyeshi, ne cisabo cakwa Noa
Icipangano ca nkongolo — “tapakatale paaba ilyeshi lya konaula nakabili”

babel.name: Ulupungu lwa Babeli
babel.note: Pa kuipakasha ukufwaya ukufika ku muulu, Lesa avulunganya ululimi lwabo no kusalanganya abantu pa calo.
events: “Natukule umusumba ne lupungu… no kuipangila ishina”
Lesa avulunganya ululimi lwabo
Abantu basalangana pa calo (Shinari — kabili Babiloni)

ur.name: Uri
ur.today: kapinda ka kuso aka Iraq ya lelo
ur.note: Ilyashi lya pusukilo mu Baibolo lyatampa no kwita kwa muntu umo.
events: Lesa aita Abramu ukufuma ku Uri wa baKaldi
“Nkalenga ukuti ukabe umushobo uukalamba… abantu bonse bakapaalwa muli iwe”
Ku cisumino afuma mu calo cakwabo

haran.name: Harani
haran.today: kapinda ka kuso aka Türkiye ya lelo
haran.note: Mu nshila, asuka ukwitwa ukulola ku calo cabulayo.
events: Ulupwa lwakwa Tera lwaikala mu Harani
Tera afwa
Abramu afuma ukuya ku Kanani na myaka 75

shechem.name: Shekemu · Kanani
shechem.note: Mu calo cabulayo ulupwa lwatendekwa kabili icipangano cipita ku nkulo iikonkapo.
events: Ukwingila mu Kanani, iciipailo ca ntanshi — “ku bufyashi bobe nkapeela ici calo”
Icipangano (Icitendekelo 15) · Isaki · Yakobo
Abana 12 abakwa Yakobo — umushi wa mikowa 12

egypt.name: Egupto (Gosheni)
egypt.today: Icabanda ca Naile, Egupto ya lelo
egypt.note: Ulupwa lwaluka umushobo uukalamba — kabili uluko lwa basha.
events: Yosefe, uwashitiswe, aluka kateka mu Egupto
Ulupwa lonse lwakwa Yakobo lwaisa pakuti lufume mu nsala
Uluko ulwakulile ulwa Israeli lwacitwa abasha

sinai.name: Ulupili lwa Sinai
sinai.note: Ipusukilo likalamba ilya Cipangano ca Kale — basha baluka abantu bakwa Lesa.
events: Ifikansa 10 no mwana wa mpaanga wa Pasaka
Bemba Wakashika waputuka kabili baabuka
Amafunde 10, Amalango, Itempele lya nsalu na milambo

kadesh.name: Kadeshi (matololo)
kadesh.note: Ukukana ukusumina kwasenda inkulo icalo — lelo Lesa aikala nabo.
events: Abalondo 12 — lelo abantu bakaana ukucetekela
Imyaka 38 mu matololo — mana, ciluli ne mulilo
Pa fyabu fya Moabu, ilyashi lya kupelako ilyakwa Mose (Amafunde)

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Pa kupelako baingila no kupoka icalo cabulayo.
events: Yordani aputuka kabili abantu baabuka
Amalinga ya Yeriko yawa
Ukucimfya kwa Kanani no kuyana icalo

shiloh.name: Shilo (Abapingushi)
shiloh.note: Ukwabula imfumu, onse alecita ifyo amwene — imfumu ya cine yalefwaikwa.
events: Itempele lya nsalu lyaiminikwa mu Shilo
Ukupilibuka kwa lubembu–kucushiwa–kulubulwa (Debora, Gideoni, Samsoni)
Ruti — ukucetekela mu nshiku ishafiita, mu lupwa lwakwa Davidi

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu · Ubufumu Bwaikatene
jerusalem.note: Inshita yasumine iya Israeli — ne bulayo bwa mfumu ya pe na pe.
events: Saulo imfumu ya ntanshi, lyena Davidi na Goliati
Icipangano na Davidi — “icipuna cobe pe na pe” (2 Samwele 7)
Solomone akula Itempele mu Yerusalemu

samaria.name: Samaria · Ubufumu Bwakanyene
samaria.note: Ubufumu bwakanyanwa no kuonaika ilyo bakasesema balelila.
events: Pa numa ya kwa Solomone, ukukanyanwa kwa Yuda na Israeli
Ukupepa tulubi ukubwekeshapo
Eliya, Esaya, Yeremia balila ‘bweleleni’ — kabili basesema Mesia

nineveh.name: Ninebe (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Ku kusuula ukucenjesha konse, ubufumu bwa kuso bwawa intanshi.
events: Ninebe, umusumba mukalamba wa Asiria
Ubufumu bwa kuso bwawa ku Asiria (722 BC)
Yona atumwa ku Ninebe

babylon.name: Babiloni
babylon.note: Ubushiku bwafiita nganshi — lelo ubulayo bwa kubwesha bucili.
events: Yerusalemu yawa, Itempele lyapya (586 BC)
Yuda basendwa ku Babiloni
Danieli na Esekieli — icisumino ne fimonwa mu bunkole

susa.name: Susa (Persia)
susa.note: Nangu pa mutima wa bufumu bwa bashipepa, Lesa asunga abantu bakwe.
events: Persia bacimfya Babiloni
Esta apususha abaYuda ku kuonaulwa
Nehemia apepa ku cinso ca mfumu kabili atumwa

return.name: Ukubwela ku Yerusalemu
return.note: Babwela no kukula cipya — lelo takuli imfumu iyaisa. Balolela Mesia.
events: Amabunga yatatu yabwela ku cisongo cakwa Sirusi (Serubabele 538 · Esra 458 · Nehemia 444)
Itempele lyakulwa cipya na malinga ya Yerusalemu yabweshiwa
Malaki — Icipangano ca Kale capelela: “nkatuma inkombe yandi”

bethlehem.name: Betelehemu
bethlehem.note: Mesia uwalailwe aisa ku musumba wakwa Davidi — Lishiwi lyaluka umuntu.
events: Afyalwa mu Betelehemu, umusumba wakwa Davidi
Bamalaika bashimika ilyashi ku bacemi
Abamano baisa ukupepa

nazareth.name: Nasareti
nazareth.note: Lesa akulila nge muntu mu musumba uwa cabe.
events: Akulila mu ng'anda ya kapula wa fimuti
Pa myaka 12, alepusha no kwasuka mu Itempele
Pa numa akaanwa mu sunagoge wa ku mwabo

jordan.name: Umumana wa Yordani
jordan.note: Umulimo wakwe wa pa lwalala watampa — umuulu wamushininkisha nge Mwana.
events: Abatishiwa kuli Yoani
Umupashi watentemuka kwati nkunda — “Uyu e Mwana wandi uo ntemwa”
Acimfya amatunko yatatu yakwa Satana mu matololo

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Mu cipesha amano cakwe ca ntanshi alanga ubukata bwakwe.
events: Umweni pa bwinga
Amenshi yaaluka waini — icipesha amano cakwe ca ntanshi
Abasambi bakwe bamusumina

sychar.name: Sukari (Samaria)
sychar.note: Inshila ya mulimo wa kutampa — ukupita Yerusalemu ukufika ku Samaria uwasuulwa.
events: Asangulula Itempele mu Yerusalemu
Ubushiku, Nikodemo — “mufwile ukufyalwa cipya”
Amenshi ya bumi ku mwanakashi wa Samaria

capernaum.name: Kapernaumu
capernaum.today: kumbali ya bemba wa Galileya ya lelo
capernaum.note: Incende ya mulimo mu Galileya — ukwita, ukusambilisha no kukaanwa fyonse fyasangwa kuno.
events: Aita abalondo ba sabi kabili aikala kuno
Ilyashi lya pa lupili — “Balipaalwa abapina mu mupashi”
Imisango ya Bufumu — no kukaanwa ukulekula

galilee.name: Bemba wa Galileya
galilee.note: Ku maka pa fyabumbwa alanga uyo abe.
events: “Talala, ikala tondolo” — atalalika icikuku
Aliisha 5,000 ku mikate isano ne sabi fibili
Aenda pa menshi

caesarea_p.name: Kaisarea Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Abasambi baishiba ukuti ni Kristu, kabili inshila ya cifulebente yaisuka.
events: Ukusumina kwakwa Petelo — “Imwe muli Kristu, Mwana wakwa Lesa wa mweo”
Asesema intanshi imfwa yakwe no kubuka
Aaluka mu bukata pa lupili

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Pa nshila ya kunina ku Yerusalemu, afwaya abaluba.
events: Apeela amenso ku impofu Bartimeo
Aita Sakeo kapokela wa misonko
“Mwana wa muntu aishile ukufwaya no kupususha abaluba”

bethany.name: Betani
bethany.note: Alanga amaka pa mfwa pa cinso ca mulungu wakwe uwa kupelako.
events: Abusha Lasaro ku nshiishi — “Nine kubuka no bumi”
Maria amusuba mafuta ku kushiika
Ici cipesha amano cikosha ukupanga ukumwipaya

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Icapwililika ico Baibolo lyonse lilola — cifulebente, kubuka, kunina.
events: Ukwingila kwa bukata; awisha amatebulo ya mu Itempele nakabili
Pa Cakulya ca pa Numa asamba abasambi amakasa
Afwa pa cifulebente
Abuka pa bushiku bwacitatu, lyena anina

antioch.name: Antiokia
antioch.note: Icilonganino ca kutuma uko ubutumwa ku bena fyalo butampila kabili babwelelapo.
events: Mu kupepa Umupashi apaatula Barnaba na Saulo
Icilonganino uko abasumina baitilwe intanshi ‘Bena Kristu’
Incende ya kutampila umwendo wa 1, 2 na 3

seleucia.name: Seleukia
seleucia.note: Icabu ca Antiokia — baabuka ukuya ku Kupro.

salamis.name: Salami (Kupro)
salamis.note: Incende ya ntanshi pa Kupro — bashimika mu masunagoge.

paphos.name: Pafo
paphos.note: Amaka yalangwa ku abakaana imbila nsuma.
events: Elima kalozi apuminwa impofu
Sergio Paulo katwalo asumina
Ukufuma kuno ‘Paulo’ atampa ukutangilila

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Icabu ca mu Pamfilia — kuno Yoani Mako abwelela.

pantioch.name: Antiokia wa Pisidia
pantioch.note: Imbila nsuma yaisula ukulola ku bena fyalo.
events: Ilyashi litali lya lyashi lya pusukilo mu sunagoge
Abena fyalo abengi basekelela no kupokelela icebo
Batamfiwa ku kupanga

iconium.name: Ikonio
iconium.note: Abengi basumina, lelo ukupakaswa kwabacindikisha ukuya.

lystra.name: Listra
events: Aposha umuntu uwalemana ukufuma ku kufyalwa
Ibumba lyaesha ukutuula milambo kuli bo kwati balesa
Apelwa amabwe no kushiwa kwati nafwa, lelo aima

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Abasambi abengi bacitwa; babwelela ku kukosha amacilonganino.

troas.name: Troa
troas.note: Apo imbila nsuma yatampa ukulola ku Europe.
events: Icimonwa ca muntu wa ku Makedonia
“Iseni muno mutwafwe”
Baabuka bwangu ukuya ku Europe

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.today: kapinda ka kuso aka Greece ya lelo
philippi.note: Icilonganino ca ntanshi ca Europe — imbila nsuma yacimfya nangu mu cifungo.
events: Lidia, kashitisha wa nsalu sha lwafifita, asumina
Umusha mukashana uwalebuka alubulwa
Inyimbo sha pakati ka bushiku, icinkukuma, ulupwa lwa kalinda fingo lwapususha

thess.name: Tesalonika
thess.note: Icebo cisensha umusumba kabili ukupakaswa kwatutuma.
events: Alanshanya mu sunagoge amasabato yatatu
“Aba abapilibula icalo conse”
Banyenekela ubushiku

berea.name: Berea
events: Bapokelela icebo no kufwaisha
Cila bushiku baceeya Amalembo pakuti bashininkishe
Abengi baisa mu kusumina

athens.name: Atene
athens.note: Mu musumba wa baceenjela alabila ‘lesa uushaishibikwa’.
events: Akalipwa ku musumba uwaisula utulubi
Pa Areopago abila Kabumba no kubuka
Bamuseka, lelo banono basumina

corinth.name: Korinti
corinth.note: Aikala umwaka no hafu, akula icilonganino mu musumba wa bubifi.
events: Apanga matenti na Akwila na Prisila
“Witiina… pantu ndi nobe”
Abena Korinti abengi basumina kabili babatishiwa

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Umutima wa mwendo wa citatu — icebo casalangana mu Asia.
events: Ukusambilisha cila bushiku imyaka ibili mu ng'anda yakwa Turano
Amabuku ya bulozi yaocwa; imilimo ya maka
Demetrio kapanga wa silfa atampa icikatakata

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Ukulaya kwa filamba ku bakalamba ba cilonganino ca Efeso.
events: “Cingilileni icilonganino ico ashitile ku mulopa wakwe mwine”
Abakalamba balila, baishiba ukuti tabakamumona nakabili

caesarea.name: Kaisarea
caesarea.today: kumbali ya bemba ya Israeli ya lelo
caesarea.note: Pa myaka ibili acingilila imbila nsuma ku bateka na mfumu.
events: Amilandu ku bateka Felike na Festo
Ukucingilila kwakwe ku Mfumu Agripa
“Ndalomba ukupingulwa kuli Kaisare” — ukuya ku Roma

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Aikatwa mu Itempele, inshila yakwe nge nkole yatampa.
events: Aikatwa ku bumba mu Itempele
Aicingilila ku cilye
Nge muntu wa ku Roma, atumwa na balinda ku Kaisarea

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Bapaluka ku bwato bwa ku Alesandria ubwaleya ku Roma.

fairhaven.name: Ifyabu Fisuma (Kreta)
fairhaven.note: Ukucenjesha kwakwa Paulo ukuti baleke ukwabuka takwaumfwilwe.

crete.name: Kreta
crete.note: Pa numa ya kufutuluka, icishi uko ashiile Tito ukutantika amacilonganino.
events: Ashiila Tito ukubika abakalamba mu musumba onse
Alomba abatungulushi abashabula umulandu, abacetekwa
Alemba ikalata kuli Tito

malta.name: Malita
malta.note: Mu cinkukuma no kuonaika kwa bwato, ubulayo bwakwa Lesa bwaiminina.
events: Umwela uwa ‘ku kabanga ka kuso’ wakonaula ubwato, lelo bonse 276 bapususha
Asumwa ne nsoka, lelo tacishiwe
Aposha abalwele ba pa cishi

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Bafika mu Italy kabili banonkwa na basumina banankwe.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Imilimo 28 · Makalata ya mu Cifungo · 2 Timote
rome.note: Imbila nsuma yafika ku mutima wa bufumu pa kupelako — te mpela lelo ni ntendekelo.
events: Imyaka ibili mu cifungo ca pa ng'anda, abila Ubufumu mu kushipa
Ukufuma kuno alemba Makalata ya mu Cifungo (Efeso·Filipi·Kolose·Filemoni)
Pa numa akakwa nakabili, alemba 2 Timote kabili epaiwa — “Nalilwa ubulwi busuma, nalipwisha ulubilo”

journeys.j5: Umwendo wa cisano · pa numa ya kufutuluka
